title: U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, UN watchdog says
summary_full: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.
summary_public: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites
